title: Charro a la fuerza
writer: Carlos León, Miguel Morayta, Mariá de Los Ángeles Vayreda
actors: Luis Aguilar, Consuelo Guerrero de Luna, Delia Magaña
plot: In order to claim a huge inheritance Clara must wed her grandfather's godson, but unsure if she will like him enough to marry she goes to her grandfather's Hacienda to meet him, but posing as her maid, and her maid as herself - Th...
